errors.phoneAlreadyExists: This phone number already has an account.
errors.venueAlreadyExists: This user already has a venue.
errors.lastActiveBranch: A venue must have at least one active branch.
errors.mainBranchRequired: A venue must have one main branch.
errors.invalidBranchAssignment: One or more assigned branches are invalid.
errors.branchAssignmentRequired: At least one branch assignment is required.
errors.ownerBranchAssignment: Owner branch assignments cannot be changed from this endpoint.
errors.extractionImagesRequired: Upload at least one menu image.
errors.extractionInvalidImageType: Only JPEG, PNG, and WebP menu images are supported.
errors.extractionImagesTooLarge: The uploaded images are too large for one extraction request.
errors.extractionImageLimit: This plan allows fewer images per extraction request.
errors.extractionPlanLimit: This plan has reached its menu extraction limit.
errors.subscriptionPastDue: Your subscription is past due. Public menus stay online, but workspace changes are paused.
errors.invalidPlanFeatureValue: Invalid value for this plan feature.
errors.planBranchLimit: This plan has reached its branch limit.
errors.planOverLimitBranch: This branch is over the current plan limit. Existing data is readable, but changes are paused.
errors.planStaffLimit: This plan has reached its staff user limit.
errors.planLanguageLimit: This plan allows fewer menu languages.
errors.advancedAnalyticsRequired: Advanced analytics requires a higher plan.
errors.analyticsHistoryLimit: This plan does not include that much analytics history.
errors.customQrRequired: Custom QR and poster assets require a higher plan.
errors.financeModuleRequired: Finance is not included in this venue plan.
errors.financeAdvancedAnalyticsRequired: Advanced finance analytics requires a higher plan.
errors.financeRangeLimit: This venue plan only supports finance reports for the allowed history range.
errors.dateRangeOutsideAllowedWindow: The selected date range is outside the allowed history window for this plan.
errors.paymentMethodHasTransactions: Payment method cannot be deleted because it is assigned to transactions. Deactivate it instead.
errors.categoryHasTransactions: Category cannot be deleted because it is assigned to transactions. Deactivate it instead.
errors.categoryTypeMismatch: Category type does not match transaction type.
errors.invalidFinancialBranch: Branch does not belong to this venue.
errors.oldTransactionDate: Transaction date is too old. Only transactions from the last 7 days can be added.
errors.extractionRetryNotAllowed: Only failed or rejected extraction jobs can be retried.
errors.extractionApproveNotAllowed: Only completed extraction jobs can be approved.
errors.extractionRejectNotAllowed: Only completed or failed extraction jobs can be rejected.
errors.extractionInvalidModelResponse: Gemini returned an empty or invalid menu response.
errors.extractionTimedOut: Extraction took too long and was stopped. Please try again.
errors.extractionApplyFailed: The reviewed extraction could not be applied to this menu.
